documents.title: Attention Is All You Need
documents.text: The transformer introduces scaled dot-product attention, multi-head attention, and positional encoding for sequence transduction.
documents.image_caption: Architecture diagram showing encoder decoder stacks and multi-head attention blocks.
documents.layout_hints: two-column page with figure and caption

documents.title: Precise Zero-Shot Dense Retrieval without Relevance Labels
documents.text: HyDE uses an instruction-following model to generate hypothetical documents and contrastive encoders for retrieval.
documents.image_caption: Pipeline figure for hypothetical document generation and retrieval reranking.
documents.layout_hints: method section with figure near right column

documents.title: Multimodal Benchmark Comparison
documents.text: The benchmark compares BM25, dense retrieval, and multimodal fusion across recall metrics.
documents.image_caption: Bar chart comparing recall at one recall at five and recall at twenty.
documents.layout_hints: results table spanning both columns with comparison matrix
